base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of npc_villager_palette_variants — a character (playable) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. NPC palette-grid — 16 distinct outfit palettes covering all unique town citizens Simon encounters across 8 towns (Jova/Veros/Aldra/Alijiba/Ondol/Doina/Yomi/Fetra and more). Hair + clothing colors vary. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: NPC palette-grid — 16 distinct outfit palettes covering all unique town citizens Simon encounters across 8 towns (Jova/Veros/Aldra/Alijiba/Ondol/Doina/Yomi/Fetra and more). Hair + clothing colors vary
